message:
bd-2hba: Add UI helper primitives to typography module

Add remaining UI helpers for demo_showcase consistency:
- kv_row(key, value): simple key-value row with dim key style
- kv_row_styled(key, key_style, value, value_style): customizable styles
- badge(text, style): generic badge wrapper with any style

These complement the existing helpers (status_badge, status_text,
section_header) added in bd-313x to provide all primitives needed
for consistent demo scene rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
